task_completion.description: Navigate to the Tor Circumvention manual.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open and displaying the Tor Circumvention manual (URL containing tb-manual.torproject.org/circumvention or its redirected support page).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Tor Bridges manual.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open and displaying the Tor Bridges manual (URL containing tb-manual.torproject.org/bridges or its redirected support page).

task_completion.description: Create the Transports_Summary.md file in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or file manager shows a file named 'Transports_Summary.md' located in '/home/ga/Documents/Briefing/'.

task_completion.description: Summarize circumvention methods and explicitly name three pluggable transports.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'Transports_Summary.md' are visible, containing a brief summary and explicitly listing three pluggable transports (e.g., obfs4, Snowflake, WebTunnel, or meek).

task_completion.description: Append the official bridge request email to the Markdown file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'Transports_Summary.md' include the email address 'bridges@torproject.org'.

task_completion.description: Export the Circumvention manual page as a PDF to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, PDF viewer, or browser save dialog shows 'Circumvention_Manual.pdf' being saved or existing in '/home/ga/Documents/Briefing/'.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to access the Tor documentation rather than relying solely on pre-trained knowledge.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser actively navigating to the Tor Project documentation pages.

integrity.description: The PDF was exported from the browser rather than being a falsely named text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the browser's 'Print' or 'Export to PDF' dialog being used to save the webpage.

integrity.description: The agent extracted the information from the actual pages.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen highlighting, copying, or transcribing text directly from the Tor documentation pages into the text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Markdown path: /home/ga/Documents/Briefing/Transports_Summary.md. Expected PDF path: /home/ga/Documents/Briefing/Circumvention_Manual.pdf. Required email to append: bridges@torproject.org. Required URLs to visit: tb-manual.torproject.org/circumvention and tb-manual.torproject.org/bridges (note: these may redirect to support.torproject.org). Valid pluggable transports include obfs4, meek, Snowflake, and WebTunnel (the agent must list at least three).
